metadata.description: Environment short name (dev | test | prod).
Azure region for all resources.
Deploy the optional Key Vault — only if a secret is introduced (§6.2).
Existing Log Analytics workspace id for App Insights. Empty => create a Function-scoped one (§2.3).
Always-ready Function instances to keep cold starts off the critical path (§5.2, §8).
Maximum Flex Consumption scale-out instance count (§8).
Per-instance memory (MB) for the Flex Consumption plan (§5.2, §8).
Extra tags merged onto the common tag set applied to every resource.
Azure DevOps organization URL the connector writes work items to (§6.1).
Azure DevOps project that holds the Security Recommendation work items (§4.4).
Client (app) id of the Entra app registration used as the Function Easy Auth audience (§6.3).
Enable MDC write-back: assign the recommendation to the Work Item back-reference (§4.7, Feature B). Requires the MI to have Security Admin at subscription scope.
Email domain used for the Work Item back-reference owner written to MDC (§4.7).
Environment short name (dev | test | prod). Drives resource naming.
Azure region for the identity.
Tags applied to every resource in this module.
Resource id of the user-assigned managed identity.
Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
Entra object (principal) id — used for RBAC and Easy Auth allowed callers.
Entra application (client) id — identity-based storage and Easy Auth audience.
Environment short name (dev | test | prod). Drives resource naming.
Azure region for the storage account.
Tags applied to every resource in this module.
Storage SKU: Standard_LRS for non-prod, Standard_ZRS for prod (param-driven).
Object (principal) id of the user-assigned MI granted identity-based storage RBAC.
Name of the blob container used by Flex Consumption for the deployment package.
Resource id of the storage account.
Name of the storage account (used as AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName).
Primary blob endpoint (used by the Flex Consumption deployment storage config).
Name of the deployment package container.
Environment short name (dev | test | prod). Drives resource naming.
Azure region for the telemetry resources.
Tags applied to every resource in this module.
Existing Log Analytics workspace resource id. Empty string => create a Function-scoped one (§2.3, §3.2).
Retention (days) for the Function-scoped workspace when one is created here.
Resource id of the Application Insights component.
Name of the Application Insights component.
Connection string for the Function (APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING).
Resource id of the workspace backing App Insights (created or supplied).
Environment short name (dev | test | prod). Drives resource naming.
Azure region for the plan and app.
Tags applied to every resource in this module.
Resource id of the user-assigned managed identity (Function + storage + ADO auth).
Client (application) id of the user-assigned MI — used for identity-based storage.
Object (principal) id of the shared MI allowed to call the Function via Easy Auth (§6.3).
Client (app) id of the Entra app registration that represents the Function API audience (§6.3). The MI requests a token for api://<this>.
Application Insights connection string (from app-insights.bicep).
Storage account name for identity-based Durable state (AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName).
Primary blob endpoint of the storage account (deployment package storage).
Name of the deployment package container in the storage account.
Per-instance memory (MB) for the Flex Consumption plan (§5.2, §8).
Maximum scale-out instance count for the Flex Consumption plan (§8).
Always-ready instance count to keep cold starts off the critical path (§5.2, §8).
Enable Easy Auth (Entra) restricting ingress to the allowed MI (§6.3). Function key is fallback.
Azure DevOps organization URL the connector writes work items to (§6.1). E.g. https://dev.azure.com/<org>.
Azure DevOps project that holds the Security Recommendation work items (§4.4).
Enable MDC write-back: assign the recommendation to the Work Item back-reference (§4.7, Feature B). Requires the MI to have Security Admin.
Email domain used for the Work Item back-reference owner written to MDC (§4.7). E.g. ado.local.
Resource id of the Function App.
Name of the Function App.
Default hostname of the Function App (used by the Logic App to forward events).
Azure region for the Logic App.
Tags applied to every resource in this module.
Resource id of the shared user-assigned MI used as the Easy Auth caller (§6.3).
Default hostname of the Function App to forward events to (§5.1 step 3).
Client (application) id of the Function App audience the MI requests a token for (§6.3).
EnrichAndCreate Function endpoint to forward to (§5.1 step 3). Injected by Bicep.
Entra audience (api://<clientId>) the MI requests a token for via Easy Auth (§6.3). Injected by Bicep.
Resource id of the user-assigned MI the HTTP action authenticates with (§6.3). Injected by Bicep.
Resource id of the Logic App.
Name of the Logic App.
Environment short name (dev | test | prod). Drives resource naming.
Azure region for the Key Vault.
Tags applied to every resource in this module.
Object (principal) id of the MI granted Key Vault Secrets User (§6.1, §6.2).
Enable purge protection (recommended/required in prod, param-driven §6.2).
Soft-delete retention window in days.
Enable a Private Endpoint via Flex Consumption VNet integration (§6.3). Off by default.
Resource id of the Key Vault.
Name of the Key Vault.
Vault URI (for secret references, if used).
Resource id of the shared user-assigned managed identity.
Name of the Function App.
Default hostname of the Function App.
Name of the Logic App dispatcher.
Name of the storage account backing Durable Functions.
Application Insights connection string output (for diagnostics wiring).
Resource id of the Key Vault when deployed (empty when deployKeyVault is false).
